title: Trump says U.S. and Iran to hold fresh talks in Qatar on Tuesday following weekend clashes
summary_full: The U.S. and Iran are poised to hold fresh talks on Tuesday in Qatar's capital, President Donald Trump said via social media on Monday.
summary_public: The U.S. and Iran are poised to hold fresh talks on Tuesday in Qatar's capital, President Donald Trump said via social media on Monday.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: U.S. and Iran to hold fresh talks
